# Kuber Tech Solutions

> An engineering team building high-performance full-stack applications, cloud
> infrastructure, IoT systems, and production AI for funded startups. Based in
> India (IST, UTC+5:30), working with clients in the US, UK, and UAE.

Kuber Tech Solutions is an engineering partner, not a staffing agency. Engagements
are scoped before quoting. The team works async-first with deliberate US Eastern
and UK timezone overlap.

## Services

- **AI engineering** — RAG systems, LLM integration, retrieval pipelines, evaluation
  and observability for production AI.
- **Cloud infrastructure** — AWS (EKS, Terraform), autoscaling, cost optimization.
- **IoT and connected hardware** — fleet management, AWS IoT Greengrass, edge devices.
- **Frontend engineering and performance** — Core Web Vitals, rendering strategy,
  Largest Contentful Paint optimization.
- **Design systems** — token-based component libraries governed across product squads.
- **Full-stack development** — React, Next.js, TypeScript, Ruby on Rails, real-time
  systems.

## Case studies

- [Marks & Spencer performance](https://kubertechsolutions.in/case-studies/marks-and-spencer-performance):
  Largest Contentful Paint reduced from 4.1s to 1.8s across 2M+ monthly product
  pages; checkout conversion doubled from 2% to 4%; 50–60 component design system.
- [Rivian RAG knowledge engine](https://kubertechsolutions.in/case-studies/rag-knowledge-engine):
  Hybrid dense + sparse retrieval over 500,000+ technical documents at sub-200ms
  query latency, 35% lower cloud cost than the initial spec, 99.9% uptime on EKS.
- [Custom print platform](https://kubertechsolutions.in/case-studies/custom-print-platform):
  Real-time canvas design tool on Konva.js with WebSockets, six months of iteration
  with zero regressions, green Core Web Vitals.
- [IoT device management](https://kubertechsolutions.in/case-studies/iot-xponent):
  Secure IoT fleet management with AWS IoT Greengrass and Raspberry Pi edge
  infrastructure.

## Contact

Scoping happens before quoting. Book a 30-minute call or send project details via
the contact page.
